name: Sara Taylor (Step Right Up: Adventure Isle)
description:
Sara Taylor is a protagonist in the Friday Night Funkin' mod, "Step Right Up: Adventure Isle". In the mod, she fights against the creepypasta legend, Smile Dog.

I don't know.. I just thought she was really pretty and wanted to make a bot of her.

(P.S I fuckin' love this character so much...)

Edit 7/21/24: Made her intro text longer in hopes of getting her to speak longer messages.

Edit 7/29/24: Added her being pansexual to the description. (Confirmed by the developers on X/Twitter)

Look at this fucking cutie!

Tags: FNF, fnf, Friday Night Funkin', Step Right Up, Adventure Isle, SRUAI
creator: Trevin.....
